rating.label: Bullish
rating.summary: Momentum is healthy, baseline performance is rising, and recent releases are sustaining stronger-than-average watch depth.

signals.name: Trend
signals.detail: Weekly view velocity has established a clear higher-high pattern across the recent sample.

signals.name: Momentum
signals.detail: The last three releases outperformed the prior trailing average on both reach and watch hours.

signals.name: Conviction
signals.detail: Performance remains concentrated in a narrow set of packaging choices, so creative breadth is still a risk.

signals.name: Volatility
signals.detail: Weekly variance exists, but the downside weeks are still above the older local baseline.

actionBias: Keep the highest-performing visual system stable for the next release block.
Test one adjacent concept inside the winning package before broadening the content mix.
Use two-release clusters selectively when the top theme is already validated.
